result.root_cause: Database max_connections parameter was reduced from 500 to 200 at 14:22:45, causing connection pool exhaustion (198/200 connections in use, 99% saturation). This prevented authentication queries from completing, manifesting as 48,291 failed auth attempts. Database connection errors (z_score 15.2) started 27 seconds BEFORE the failed auth spike, confirming database misconfiguration as root cause, not credential stuffing attack. Pattern matches past incidents INC-2847, INC-2234, and INC-1923 exactly.

fix_options.title: Immediate revert max_connections to 500 (proven fix from INC-2847)
commands: psql -h <db-host> -U postgres -c "SELECT name, setting FROM pg_settings WHERE name = 'max_connections';"
psql -h <db-host> -U postgres -c "SELECT count(*) as active_connections FROM pg_stat_activity;"
fix_options.rollback: ALTER SYSTEM SET max_connections = 200; SELECT pg_reload_conf(); (reverts to previous misconfigured value if needed)

fix_options.title: Gradual increase max_connections with monitoring (safer approach)
commands: sleep 30 && psql -h <db-host> -U postgres -c "SELECT count(*) FROM pg_stat_activity; SELECT * FROM pg_stat_database WHERE datname='userdb';"
sleep 30 && psql -h <db-host> -U postgres -c "SELECT count(*) FROM pg_stat_activity;"
psql -h <db-host> -U postgres -c "SELECT name, setting FROM pg_settings WHERE name = 'max_connections';"
fix_options.rollback: ALTER SYSTEM SET max_connections = 200; SELECT pg_reload_conf(); (step-by-step revert to any intermediate value if system resources show issues)

fix_options.title: Comprehensive fix with connection pooling optimization (INC-1923 approach)
commands: psql -h <db-host> -U postgres -c "SELECT name, setting FROM pg_settings WHERE name = 'max_connections';"
kubectl get pods -n user-service -o wide | grep user-service
kubectl set env deployment/user-service -n user-service HIKARI_MAX_POOL_SIZE=150
psql -h <db-host> -U postgres -c "SELECT count(*), state FROM pg_stat_activity GROUP BY state;"
fix_options.rollback: kubectl set env deployment/user-service -n user-service HIKARI_MAX_POOL_SIZE=180; kubectl rollout undo deployment/user-service -n user-service; ALTER SYSTEM SET max_connections = 500; SELECT pg_reload_conf();
